channel.title: Go Humble! RSS All
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle all bundles!

item.title: Unreal Environment Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Craft beautiful vistas in a fraction of the time it normally takes your team with the all-new Unreal Environment Bundle. Set the scene for epic boss battles, cozy sims, and more with crisp, easy-to-use preset Environmental Packs like Coast & Dunes, Mountain, Forest, Meadow, and more. Add layers of detailed depth to any scenery or scenario with asset sets that mesh seamlessly with each other. Unlock everything you need from the ground up with these elite environmental tools from NatureManufacture, and help support the Starlight Children's Foundation with your purchase!



Bundle ends: 2026-07-02T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 502.6 hours / 20.94 days

item.title: The Complete Inkle Library
item.content:encoded:
Dive into worlds unknown and challenges unconquered with this bundle of interactive narrative puzzle games from Inkle! Search through an archive of lost books hidden inside an old computer to solve the secrets of TR-49! Decipher the language of an ancient civilization hidden inside a nebula in Heaven’s Vault! Climb, jump, run, and sing your way through the rainy Scottish highlands in A Highland Song! Take on Jules Verne’s legendary trip around the world in the award-winning globetrotting game 80 Days! There are even more Inkle classics to be found in this exciting bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice and help support Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before January 1st, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-07-02T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 485.6 hours / 20.23 days

item.title: The Unity Game Development Mastery Bundle by Zenva
item.description: Start your game dev journey with Zenva
item.content:encoded:
Learn the knowledge you need to succeed in modern game development with a little help from the pros at Zenva. Pay what you want for instructor-recorded courses, practice exams, mini-project games to further build your skills, and more. Get up to speed quickly with lessons like Intermediate Design Patterns in C# with Unity 6 and Create a 2D Platformer in Unity: Build a Side-Scrolling Game from Scratch before it’s too late! Realize your artistic vision in 3D or 2D and help support Alzheimer's Research UK!

Bundle ends: 2026-07-01T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 478.6 hours / 19.94 days

item.title: Creature and Character Creation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Bring monstrosities, blood-dripping creatures, and ghastly ghouls to life with a curated bundle of assets designed to get your players’ hearts pumping! Pay what you want for hundreds of specialized asset packs that work seamlessly with your preferred creation platforms, such as VDM Blender and ZBrush, including Faceit: Facial Expressions and Performance Capture and Base Mesh Mega Pack 3D Models - Human, Anime & Cartoon Animals. Plus, your purchase includes 44 ears, 44 teeth, 44 noses, and much, much more. Create amazing monsters before it’s too late, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before October 31, 2026.

Bundle ends: 2026-07-01T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 478.6 hours / 19.94 days

item.title: Yuri in Luck: Waifus for Laifus
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Find love, companionship, and maybe a little romance with the Yuri in Luck: Waifus for Laifus Bundle—a colorful collection of LGBTQ+-themed yuri titles! Play “Yuri Cupid” in Kindred Spirits on the Roof, a slice-of-life tale of love, loss, lust, and friendship. Lead a romantic cat-and-mouse game with a supernatural spin across a gorgeous watercolor-style backdrop in OshiRabu: Waifus Over Husbandos. Or lose yourself in SeaBed, a deep psychological mystery visual novel told through the perspectives of three unique characters. Plus, your purchase helps support our friends at Dames 4 Games.

Keys expire. Please redeem before July 1st, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-07-02T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 485.6 hours / 20.23 days

item.title: Bigger Better Bundle
item.content:encoded:
The Bigger Better Bundle brings together a 65 pack collection of premium and professional game development content from Meshingun Studio and Dekogon Studios. Explore complete environments, modular building systems, foliage, props, materials, decorations, vehicles, and world-building tools across fantasy, historical, modern, industrial, and stylized themes. Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time, and help support the Forest School Foundation with your purchase!

Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time.

Build Bigger 🚀

Keys Expire. Please redeem before May 19th, 2027. Professional Fab Marketplace keys and Unity Asset Store keys provided.



Bundle ends: 2026-06-30T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 454.6 hours / 18.94 days

item.title: Tad Williams: Otherland, Osten Ard, and More by DAW Books
item.content:encoded:
Experience the boundless imagination of best-selling science fiction and fantasy author Tad Williams with this vast collection of eBooks. Feel hums of energy radiating off the page with the techno-thriller City of Golden Shadow—your intro to the acclaimed Otherland series, where vast conspiracies harness wondrous VR worlds for wicked ends. Journey into Williams’ beloved fantasy world of Osten Ard with the The Witchwood Crown. Unlock 20+ amazing eBooks all for a price you choose, and help support the ACLU with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-30T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 454.6 hours / 18.94 days

item.title: Vast Fantasy Worlds Game Dev Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Build everything from skybound cities and towering realms to dark dungeons, futuristic settings, and enchanted adventures with over 400 assets from the Vast Fantasy Worlds Bundle by KitBash3D. This curated collection gives artists a versatile range of detailed assets for crafting immersive, story-rich environments with speed and flexibility. Whether you're creating for games, film, or concept art, these fully customizable kits are designed to fit seamlessly into your workflow. Compatible with Blender, Unreal, Unity, Maya, and more. Plus, your purchase helps support Girls Who Code!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 29th, 2027.



Bundle ends: 2026-06-29T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 430.6 hours / 17.94 days

item.title: Professor DM's Dungeon Crawl Classics Essentials Bundle Presented by Dungeon Craft
item.description: This one’s for the dungeon crawlers
item.content:encoded:
If you’re an avid follower of Dungeon Craft or simply want to test your mettle on a new adventure, you’ll want to snag this bundle of TTRPG rulebooks, adventures, inspiration manuals, and more presented by the one, the only Professor DM! In this library of over 100 ebooks and PDFs, you’ll find Dungeon Crawl Classics adventures like The Croaking Fane and Intrigue at the Court of Chaos, eldritch alphabets, how-to manuals, horror and romance tales, and a lot more—even hard copies of four random adventures with your purchase! This bundle has everything you need and more to kick off your next campaign, so get it now at the price of your choice, and support St. Jude Children’s Hospital!

The titles in this bundle are available through DTRPG.

Keys expire. Please redeem your digital tier keys before June 29th, 2027, and your physical tier key before December 31st, 2026.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-29T16:00:00 UTC
Time left: 428.6 hours / 17.86 days

item.title: Redline Racing Bundle
item.description: Breakneck speed is all you need
item.content:encoded:
Buckle up for a furiously fast collection of unique and exciting racing games with the Redline Racing Bundle! Play Assetto Corsa Competizione, the official GT World Challenge video game experience, and more. Hit curves at top speeds in Art of Rally, a stylized, top-down take on rally car racing, compete on the iconic tracks of Japan’s legendary EBISU circuit in Drift CE, or try extreme downhill freeriding in Descenders, a bike racer where mistakes have real consequences! Dominate the tracks and help support the Starlight Children’s Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 26th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-27T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 365.6 hours / 15.23 days

item.title: The Complete Unity AI Bundle
item.description: Discover what’s possible with Unity AI
item.content:encoded:
Pay what you want to learn how to use Unity AI, the ultimate AI assistant from the pros at Mammoth Club. Unity AI is your agentic assistant—editor-integrated, project-aware, and designed to streamline your workflows. It’s also your AI gateway, connecting directly to your models and tools to maximize performance, security, and control, while serving as your bridge to Unity from your IDE or preferred application. Highlighted by lessons like Build a TikTok LIVE Game with Unity AI - Interactive Chat-Controlled Game, this curated collection offers everything you need to become an AI mastermind. Save time, money, and reduce operational friction with the Complete Unity AI Bundle before it’s gone!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 07, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-07-07T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 622.6 hours / 25.94 days

item.title: Frosty Games Fest Showcase Bundle 2026: Made in ANZ
item.description: Refresh your collection with international games
item.content:encoded:
Grab this collection featuring 11 of the coolest games made in Australia and New Zealand, from studios like PikPok, League of Geeks, and more! Claim the Infernal Throne of Hell in the turn-based strategy game Solium Infernum, or experience the wacky and surprisingly dynamic shooter 420BLAZEIT 2: GAME OF THE YEAR -=Dank Dreams and Goated Memes=- [#wow/11 Like and Subscribe] Poggerz Edition. Play the coolest games from Australian and New Zealand developers and celebrate Frosty Games Fest from the comfort of your home!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 26th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-27T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 365.6 hours / 15.23 days

item.title: The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle
item.description: Unlock your creative side with Unity
item.content:encoded:
Your new career in game development is only a click away with The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle! No prior knowledge is needed for this curated collection of lessons from GameDev.tv—just come prepared with a curious mind and a passion for gaming. Get started today and create your own RPG, 2D adventure, and more with courses like Unity Turn Based Strategy Course and Unity Real Time Strategy Course. Get the expert instruction you need from pros in the field, and help support Trees, Water & People with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 334.6 hours / 13.94 days

item.title: Roll Big or Go Home 2
item.content:encoded:
Become the main character of your favorite novel, film series, or game with this giant bundle of tabletop roleplaying books! This TTRPG library features core rulebooks and adventures set in tons of different franchises, from Doctor Who and Warhammer to Cthulhu, Transformers, and even My Little Pony! Basically, if you’re a fan of something, it’s probably in here. You’ll also find core books from classic roleplaying franchises like Return to Dark Tower and original storylines like Household and Visigoths vs. Mall Goths! Assemble your friends, grab a set of dice, and pick from over 50 TTRPG books to plan your next one-night adventure or neverending campaign. Grab this bundle now for the price of your choosing, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 334.6 hours / 13.94 days

item.title: 2K Sports Champions Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Hit the links, the hardwood, the ring, and beyond with the 2K Sports Champions Bundle! Ball out in NBA 2K26 Standard Edition with an additional 35,000 VC to customize your experience, feel the speed of the hottest greens on Earth in PGA Tour 2K25 Standard Edition, dominate the men’s or women’s circuit in TopSpin 2K25 Grand Slam Edition, and more from 2K Sports! Pay what you want for an epic collection of the biggest sports franchises in gaming and help support Covenant House with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 24th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 317.6 hours / 13.23 days

item.title: IGN Live Bundle 2026
item.content:encoded:
Kick off IGN Live 2026 with a bundle of IGN’s top-rated video games! From famous favorites to underrated gems, this bundle has a little bit of everything—and only the good stuff. Uncover the secrets of the Oldest House and save our dimension from the evil Hiss in CONTROL Ultimate Edition, including the main game and all expansions! Hoist the colors and set sail on a swashbuckling adventure aboard a magical ghost ship in Shadow Gambit: The Cursed Crew! Befriend charming characters and solve fun mysteries while exploring the hand-drawn landscapes of TOEM: A Photo Adventure! There are even more top-rated games and IGN editor’s picks to be found in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice, support Child’s Play charity with your purchase, and be sure to tune in to IGN Live 2026!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 24th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:30:00 UTC
Time left: 318.1 hours / 13.26 days

item.title: We Will Always Be Here: Pride Month 2026
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate Pride Month 2026 with a bundle of queer-centric and inclusive games of all genres! Battle your exes and take on surreal cooking challenges in the outrageously fun “breakup simulator” Thirsty Suitors! Save the worlds of mortals and gods by looking into the future in the gorgeous adventure game Harmony: The Fall of Reverie! Run your dream D&D-inspired tavern in a cozy fantasy world in the charming visual novel Tavern Talk! There’s even more adventure, romance, and fun to be found in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choosing and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 6th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 317.6 hours / 13.23 days

item.title: Krotos Cinematic Sound Suite
item.content:encoded:
Add epic sound effects on the fly with the unmatched power of Krotos Studio! Trusted by creative leaders like Disney, EPIC Games, EA, and more, Krotos delivers frictionless, professional-quality audio production. Easily drag and drop sounds into popular programs like Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve, or integrate Krotos directly into your DAW for unparalleled creative control. Unlock Krotos Studio through Humble Bundle today and enjoy 3 free months of service, plus additional starter sound effect libraries to kick-start your projects. Pay what you want for elite audio creation tools and help support the Starlight Children's Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-24T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 310.6 hours / 12.94 days

item.title: Cyberpunk RED: The Ready-to-Run Essentials Bundle
item.description: Take it to the Edge, choomba
item.content:encoded:
In the digital dystopia of the future, you’re crammed with chrome and calling the shots. Set your next tabletop adventure in the neon-drenched streets of Night City with these Cyberpunk RED TTRPG essentials! This bundle is chock-full of maps, cross-platform bundles of rulebooks and tools, mission kits, and more resources for planning your next campaign in the world of Cyberpunk and turning your friends into the Edgerunners they were always meant to be. Bring down the corpos and take Night City for yourselves with this great bundle, and support Tabletop Gaymers with your purchase at the price of your choosing!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 30th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-30T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 454.6 hours / 18.94 days

item.title: Embroidery, Sashiko, and Decorative Stitching by Open Road
item.description: This bundle will have you in stitches
item.content:encoded:
Level up your stitching game with this bundle of instruction and inspiration books from Open Road! Learn the basics of sashiko, kogin, thread painting, and tons of other embroidery techniques to turn simple fabric crafts into heirloom masterpieces! Try a new stitch every day with Sashiko 365, master the embroidery patterns in The Ultimate Kogin Collection, sample the gorgeous greenery in 200 Embroidered Flowers, turn fabric into a canvas with A-Z of Thread Painting, and so much more! This bundle has 17 ebooks with patterns and inspo for just about everything, so let your imagination run wild! Choose what you pay for all of these great books, and support Make A Wish with your purchase.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-30T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 454.6 hours / 18.94 days

item.title: Python: The Good Stuff by No Starch
item.description: Unlock The Good Stuff for Python
item.content:encoded:
Pick up the pace in life when you start using Python to power up your programming output. Learn coding quickly with Python Crash Course, speed up and simplify your life with Automate the Boring Stuff with Python, create AI that learns from vast amounts of data with Practical Deep Learning, or start bending Excel to your will with Python for Excel Users. Pay what you want for A+ eBooks that help your career grow, and help support the Python Software Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 262.6 hours / 10.94 days

item.title: Fantasy Game Dev Assets By Synty
item.content:encoded:
Game developers, rejoice! The pros at Synty Studios are here to help you take your project from baseline to beta with our latest Software Bundle. Build your worlds with professional-quality assets like photorealistic particle effects, prepare for lifelike duels with a fantasy rival pack, and more. Add complex interfaces or simple dungeons—anything you need to help bring your dream game to life. You’ll even get a $10 voucher for the Synty Studios store to keep creating. Pay what you want for AAA-quality assets and help support Code.org with your purchase.

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 31st, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 262.6 hours / 10.94 days

item.title: The Complete Business and AI Certification Bundle
item.description: Bolster your business with AI support
item.content:encoded:
It’s time to level up your business tech skills—develop the fundamental knowledge needed to prepare for operation-changing AI certification exams with our latest Software Bundle. This comprehensive curriculum contains everything you need to develop pivotal AI skills across the most popular business platforms from companies like Microsoft and Google. Highlighted by courses like Asana Workflow Specialist Certificate with Practice Exam and Project Management Institute - Project Management Professional (PMP) with Practice Exam, two of many first-time Humble Bundle Exclusives. Streamline your business with AI support and help Make-A-Wish with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before Jun 22, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 262.6 hours / 10.94 days

item.title: The Ultimate ABLAZE Manga Collection
item.content:encoded:
Manga library looking a little empty? We can fix that! We’ve teamed up with ABLAZE to bring you a huge bundle of the publisher’s most beloved manga, manhwa, and pinoy manga ebook series and collections, perfect for oldheads and new fans alike! Dive into the cutthroat world of professional chess (and pick up a few moves as you read) in Blitz! Discover the mystery of a hidden painting in JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure one-shot Rohan at the Louvre! Jump back in time to one of the O.G.s of science fiction manga (and one of director James Cameron’s favorite characters) in the Captain Harlock collection! That’s only a taste of what we have in store for you in this mega manga bonanza, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support Starlight Children’s Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-20T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 214.6 hours / 8.94 days

item.title: Kodansha Presents: BL, Yuri & More from Ichijinsha
item.description: Get over $1200 worth of BL, Yuri & Other Hit Ichijinsha Manga in one bundle
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Looking to bolster your digital manga collection with BL, Yuri and more while also saving big in the process? Get more than 100 digital volumes and over $1200 worth of fan-favorite series like How to Deal When Your Intimidating Neighbor is Actually an Omega, I Want to Love You Till Your Dying Day (Anime debuting this summer), and Wotakoi: Love is Hard for Otaku for only $30 with the Kodansha Presents: BL, Yuri & More from Ichijinsha bundle. A Humble-first, this bundle is the best way to experience Kodansha's Ichijinsha manga offerings while also supporting the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund—a non-profit organization dedicated to protecting the First Amendment rights of the comics art form and its community of retailers, creators, publishers, librarians, and readers.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-19T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 190.6 hours / 7.94 days

item.title: 12 for $10
item.description: Great games at a great discount
item.content:encoded:
What’s better than getting a bunch of fun, exciting video games you can play for hours? Getting them at a fantastic discount! Our latest 12 for $10 bundle is exactly what it says on the tin: 12 of our favorite games for just $10. Put your hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills to the test with the famously tricky (and famously fun) platformer Super Meat Boy! Enter the pixelated world of an ’80s cop show and solve the murders at the heart of Beat Cop! Hunt down anomalies and battle swarms of enemies in the cyberpunk action-adventure Anomaly Agent! There’s a lot more fun to be had in this bundle, so grab it now for just $10, and support buildOn with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 19th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-20T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 197.6 hours / 8.23 days

item.title: Critical Hits: ARPG Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Gather your weapons, rev your engines, and prepare for your greatest adventure yet with this bundle of action-adventure RPGs! Complete a hero-less land’s backlog of quests and survive the tricky combat mechanics of RPG parody game The Last Hero of Nostalgaia! Keep your bow strung and your enemies in your sights in the dark Baba Yaga origin myth retelling Blacktail! Explore uncharted new lands in the cult-classic Greedfall! There are so many more worlds to explore and quests to discover in this action-adventure bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support the global efforts of Whale and Dolphin Conservation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-19T01:00:35 UTC
Time left: 173.6 hours / 7.23 days

item.title: Learn Unreal Engine 2026 Course Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Harness the power of Unreal Engine with our latest Software Learning Bundle by Zenva. This expert-led collection contains specialized courses designed to help you build any genre of game: integrate strategy and base building into your next project with Build a Tower Defense Game in Unreal Engine, scare the pants off players with Make a Horror Game in Unreal Engine, or add a splash of retro fun with Develop a Classic Shoot 'em Up with Unreal Engine. Get serious about game design for a price you choose and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 166.6 hours / 6.94 days

item.title: Melodic Mayhem Vol. 2: A Comprehensive Audio and Music Bundle
item.description: So much melodic mayhem we had to drop a Vol. 2!
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with the Melodic Mayhem Vol. 2: A Comprehensive Audio and Music Bundle. Highlights from this extensive library of beta-ready assets include the Reece Coetzer Voice Over Pack, Ambient Music Pack Vol. 5, Fantasy UI Sound FX Pack, and more. Explore a variety of genres, from Heavy Metal guitars to soothing fantasy strings and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support a charity of your choice with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 166.6 hours / 6.94 days

item.title: The Free League RPG Collection
item.description: Fresh TTRPGs by Free League Publishing
item.content:encoded:
Ready to spice up your TTRPG collection with the hottest titles from Free League Publishing? Unlock the core set for Dragonbane, an exhilarating classic fantasy game full of magic, mystery, and adventure that offers “mirth and mayhem roleplaying,” aka hearty laughs and brutal challenges. Or brave Mutant: Year Zero, a post-apocalyptic tale of humanity’s crawl back from streets turned graveyards as godlike mutants roam the wasteland. Try these or Vaesen: A Wicked Secret, all for a price you choose, and help support Direct Relief with your purchase.

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-17T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 142.6 hours / 5.94 days

item.title: Awesome Automation
item.content:encoded:
Sit back, relax, and let these games do all the work for you—well, almost all the work. You get to do the fun part! From fantasy stories to farming simulators, these games run on automation while you call the shots! Let your imagination run wild while you build machines to fight monsters in the engineering roguelike Rogue Voltage! Build the farm of your dreams, harvest delicious crops, raise adorable animals, and hire help to automate all the work in MR FARMBOY! Take care of colorful, adorable Morps and build your coziest bases in Time to Morp! There are even more ways to have fun with automation in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Farm Link with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 17th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 149.6 hours / 6.23 days

item.title: Devil May Cry: Devil Trigger Reloaded Collection 2026
item.content:encoded:
Hell is empty, and all the devils are…in this bundle! All the Devil May Cry games, that is. That’s right, we’ve got the whole Devil May Cry series for the low, low price of your choosing in one bundle! Go back to where it all started with the original stylish action of Devil May Cry. Play the sequel and the prequel included in the Devil May Cry HD Collection of the first three games. Follow Dante and his new buddy Nero as they battle the demons and monsters of the Special Edition of Devil May Cry 4 and Devil May Cry 5 + Vergil Pack.

The ultimate Devil May Cry experience for the price of your choice, and every descent into the inferno supports the good folks at Breakthrough T1D charity!

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 24th, 2026.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 317.6 hours / 13.23 days

item.title: Music for Dummies 2026
item.content:encoded:
The sweet sounds of savings have arrived to make your foray into musical stardom even easier with the 2026 Music for Dummies Bundle! The professionals from the For Dummies series are back again to help you unleash your inner musician. Learn a variety of digital instruments with in-depth lessons like eMedia Guitar For Dummies Level 1-2, eMedia Piano For Dummies Level 1-2, and eMedia Singing For Dummies Level 1-2. Take your passion for digital music to superstar levels of greatness, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 16th, 2026

Bundle ends: 2026-06-16T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 118.6 hours / 4.94 days

item.title: The Ultimate Linux & SysAdmin Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Learn the skills and gain the knowledge you need to succeed in system administration and development operations for Linux with this bundle of insightful courses by Packt. Inside this amazing curriculum, you’ll get expert insights on mastering AI networking, Windows 365, PowerShell scripting, and more. Deepen your understanding of SysAdmin and DevOps whether you’re a novice or a seasoned professional with courses like The Ultimate Linux Shell Scripting Guide, Microsoft Intune Cookbook - 2E and help support the Prevent Cancer Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-16T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 118.6 hours / 4.94 days

item.title: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle by Packt
item.description: Defend your sensitive data with AI
item.content:encoded:
Nothing gets past our latest Humble Video Learning Bundle: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle! Learn how to protect your digital world using AI defensive tactics with exceptional courses from Packt. Prepare for your new career with video learning courses like Cybersecurity Fundamentals & Certification Prep – ISC2 Pathway, Mastering Cybersecurity with Python - From Basics to Advanced Defense, AZ-500 - Microsoft Azure Security Technologies - A Prep Course, more. Go from zero to cybersecurity hero, and help support the Starlight Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-15T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 94.6 hours / 3.94 days

item.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling by Wiley
item.content:encoded:
Show—don’t tell—when you integrate storytelling into your data to help paint a broader picture. Unlock eBooks from leading authors in the space, like the For Dummies team, and awesome titles like Cool Infographics: Effective Communication with Data Visualization and Design, Data Points: Visualization That Means Something, and Data-Driven Security: Analysis, Visualization and Dashboards. Pay what you want for a powerful collection of data visualization and storytelling eBooks from some of the biggest names in tech, and help support the Electronic Frontier Foundation!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-15T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 94.6 hours / 3.94 days

item.title: Ultimate AI Skills Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Don’t let the AI revolution pass you by—pay what you want for the Ultimate AI Skills Bundle and begin your learning journey today. Explore the ins and outs of ChatGPT with ChatGPT Course: Master AI for Work & Creativity, start selling your own AI imagery with Midjourney Course: Create & Monetize AI Art, master Adobe’s flagship AI tools with Adobe Firefly Course: AI-Powered Design, Illustration & Photography Tools, and more! Get the advice and knowledge you seek from expert-led courses, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-12T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 22.6 hours / 0.94 days

item.title: 4X: Xplore, Xpand, Xploit, Xterminate
item.description: Your rise to greatness will be documented
item.content:encoded:
Explore dynamic maps, expand your territory, exploit the environment for resources, and exterminate anything that interferes with a massive collection of 4X games! Lead armies and rise to greatness in Songs of Silence, a visually stunning adventure filled with intense battles and captivating stories, build an unrivaled empire and flex your galactic greatness in pure 64-bit awesomeness with Distant Worlds 2, and more! Pay what you want for epic 4X fun and help support Direct Relief with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-13T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 29.6 hours / 1.23 days

item.title: Warhammer Skulls 2026 Bundle
item.description: Celebrate ten years of Warhammer Skulls
item.content:encoded:
If you’re one of the lucky Space Marines gearing up for this year’s Warhammer Skulls festival—the tenth annual celebration!—we have a real treat for you. Build out your Warhammer 40,000 library with a bundle of strategy, shooter, and RPG games that will make the 41st millennium feel closer than ever! Build up your army and evolve your weapons arsenal in Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector! Brave the hordes of the Caligari Sector and carry out the Emperor’s will in Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr! Join the Ork forces and master the skies in Warhammer 40,000: Dakka Squadron - Flyboyz Edition! There’s even more fun to be had in this seven-game bundle, so grab it now before your enemies can take it, and support Comic Relief with your purchase at the price of your choosing!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before Jun 5th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-12T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 5.6 hours / 0.23 days

item.title: Ultimate Environment & World Building Collection
item.content:encoded:
Gorgeous and easy to implement scenery options have arrived within one curated bundle. Add unmatched realism and polish to your next development cycle with ready-to-use environmental assets designed to save you time and money! Fill your games with lost shrines, Asian terraces, medieval fantasy villages, modular Viking village kits, and so much more—all with FAB Professional License Keys! Get the environmental assets you need to help bring your next big fantasy or sci-fi game to life and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 11th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 166.6 hours / 6.94 days

item.title: Double Shift: Simulation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Love simulator games but feel like you’ve exhausted all your options? We guarantee you’ll find something to love in this bundle of sim games of all types! Take on the rustic country living in the near-endless open world of Farmer’s Life! Build your own hype house and influence your way to fame and fortune in Youtubers Life and Youtubers Life 2! Tune up your dream cars and hit the streets in the racing sim game Underground Garage! There’s so much more to explore and enjoy in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice, and choose which charity to support with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 10th, 2027

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 149.6 hours / 6.23 days

item.title: Perplexing Puzzles
item.content:encoded:
Flex your puzzle-solving skills and bend your brain into new shapes with this bundle of the best puzzle games! Challenge your sense of reality and jump inside the instant camera photos you take in Viewfinder! Solve logic puzzles to progress through a mysterious world full of secrets in Taiji! Work as a team and solve both halves of a puzzle to escape a deadly experiment in two-player co-op Parallel Experiment! There are even more exciting puzzle games to lose yourself inside in this bundle, so don’t get stumped—grab it now at the price of your choice, and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem Viewfinder before December 10th, 2026. All other titles before June 10th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 149.6 hours / 6.23 days

item.title: IK Multimedia Presents Studio Essentials: Pianos, Bass, Drums & Cinematic Sounds
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with IK Multimedia’s curated collection of studio essentials! Capture the magic of classic instruments from this extensive 1,000+ asset library of commercial-ready string, bass, and drum samples from themed packs like MODO BASS Studio Upright, Pianoverse - Grand Piano Y7, Miroslav Philharmonik 2, and more! Explore a variety of genres, from lo-fi to classical and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Music Will with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 2nd, 2027

Bundle ends: 2026-06-17T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 142.6 hours / 5.94 days

item.title: Hot Mess Express: A Big Bundle of Misfit Heroes & Hilarious Hijinks by Image Comics
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Lose yourself in a library of fantastic graphic fiction in The Hot Mess Express Bundle by Image Comics! Read creative graphic novels like Snotgirl Vol. 1: Green Hair Don’t Care, the coming-of-age story of Lottie Person, a chic yet insecure fashionista with a mysterious snot condition; I Hate Fairyland Deluxe Vol. 1-3, a mischievously magical dark adventure akin to Alice in Wonderland; and Dead Eyes Vol. 1, the origin story of Martin Dobbs, a former masked criminal forced back into a life of crime to pay his wife’s medical bills. Get 40+ comics and graphic novels, and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-16T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 118.6 hours / 4.94 days

item.title: The Ultimate Functional Programming by Pragmatic Programmers
item.content:encoded:
Start creating with a function-focused mindset with the all-new Functional Programming Bundle by Pragmatic Programmers. Learn to execute a variety of functions to save time and energy for yourself, a business, or a new programming hobby. Unlock cornerstone eBooks like Domain Modeling Made Functional, Programming Clojure Fourth Edition, From Objects to Functions, and more. Get practical resources for novice coders and seasoned pros, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-15T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 94.6 hours / 3.94 days

item.title: Build & Launch AI Apps Bundle
item.description: Build and launch AI apps in no time
item.content:encoded:
Build and launch AI apps in no time with a curated collection of twenty instructor-led courses by Zenva! Learn to harness Claude Code to vibe code a real-world slide presentation web app from start to finish and so much more! Access practical tools like live coding lessons where you can practice and instantly see the results of the changes you make to the code! Pay what you want for courses like AI-Assisted Development with Claude Code and Agentic AI with Claude Code & MCP today!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 8th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 262.6 hours / 10.94 days

item.title: Infinite Dread: Horror Comics by Oni Press
item.content:encoded:
Superheroes are all well and good, but oftentimes horror is where comics really shine. To bring you the spookiest stories the medium has to offer, we’ve teamed up with Oni Press for a selection of comics that are sure to keep you up at night! Something horrifically weird is going on and no one will talk about it in Hobtown Mystery Stories. A startling new experiment in comic book storytelling inspired by firsthand accounts of real paranormal encounters awaits in High Strangeness. And you're only alive if you're online in Cemetery Kids Don't Die. There’s even more to explore in this ghoulish library of haunts, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support BINC with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-13T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 46.6 hours / 1.94 days

item.title: The Claude Code Mastery Bundle by Zenva
item.content:encoded:
Develop software faster and learn the AI workflows modern developers are rapidly adopting with The Claude Code Mastery Bundle. Build full-stack AI apps with Next.js and Python, integrate Stripe subscriptions and modern LLM APIs, automate workflows with MCP and GitHub, and learn how to run fully private local AI systems with Ollama and OpenCode—all in one amazing bundle! Pay what you want for a masterclass collection from Zenva and support Alzheimer’s Research UK while building skills that can immediately improve how you develop software.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-13T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 46.6 hours / 1.94 days

item.title: The Best of Robert Silverberg by Open Road Media
item.content:encoded:
Feel like you’ve read all the new sci-fi and fantasy books and looking for something a little more classic? We’ve got a bundle full of the best novels and stories by celebrated author Robert Silverberg! Dive into his Majipoor Cycle with Lord Valentine’s Castle, following an amnesiac juggler who finds out he’s the heir to an entire planet, or start with the prequel trilogy launched by Sorcerers of Majipoor, and learn how the throne became so contested in the first place. Meet the new inheritors of the Earth in At Winter’s End, a tribe of humanoids who emerge from their hibernation after an apocalypse. Or keep things short and sweet with the novella Nightwings, set on an unfamiliar Earth facing alien invasion. There are many more worlds, futures, and adventures to explore in this ebook bundle of Silverberg’s work, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support the ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 166.6 hours / 6.94 days

item.title: All-In-One 2D Game Dev Level Creation Pack
item.content:encoded:
Build entire game worlds faster with this massive Level Creation Bundle from GameDev Market. Designed to streamline your workflow, this collection gives you everything you need to create levels across multiple styles - from top-down and platformer to isometric environments and beyond. Jump straight into development with ready-to-use tilesets like Wolfsong Tilesets, Pixel Art Tileset Collection, Cartoon Platformer Tileset Pack, and more, all built to help you quickly design, iterate, and expand your worlds without starting from scratch. Stop piecing levels together asset-by-asset—get a complete toolkit to bring your ideas to life, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027. The coupon expires on August 31st, 2026.

The license agreement can be found here.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-17T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 142.6 hours / 5.94 days

item.title: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-15T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 94.6 hours / 3.94 days

item.title: Spring Into Creativity
item.content:encoded:
Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-14T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 70.6 hours / 2.94 days
